commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Drink. Persians refresh yourselves.
Take up. Hebrew, "anoint. "He may also allude to the Babylonians, who were feasting.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: And in testimony of the fact that Babylon was captured during a banquet, Isaiah clearly exhorts it to battle when he writes, “Babylon, my beloved, has become a strange spectacle to me: set the table and behold in the mirrors those who eat and drink; rise up, you princes, and snatch up your shields!” - "Commentary on Daniel 2.5.31"
